name: Guangdong Hongtu Technology (Holdings) Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Hongtu Technology (Holdings) Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells precision aluminum alloy die-casting parts in China. The company also researches, develops, produces, and sells anti-ballistic transport, military police, civilian bulletproof, recreational, ambulances, inspection, disabled and engineering, and other vehicles. In addition, it produces and sells interior and exterior trims, such as automobile signs, radiator grilles, and air conditioning vents, as well as engages in the investment business. Guangdong Hongtu Technology (Holdings) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Zhaoqing, China.
